channel.title: Infrastructure as Code on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure as Code on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: CLI and SDK support for Deployment Templates
item.description:
Azure Machine Learning deployment templates now support management through the CLI and SDK in public preview. Platform teams can create, update, delete, and manage templates from infrastructure-as-code pipelines instead of using only the Azure portal.

  • Source: Azure Updates
